title: Croptilon rigidifolium
taxonomy: Croptilon rigidifolium is classified within the plant family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Croptilon. The species is a part of the Asteraceae family, which is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is based on its floral characteristics and morphological features. The species is native to Africa and is often found in grasslands and open woodlands.
